review.notes: The OCR is heavily truncated — sentences are cut mid-word (e.g. "solid d" for "solid defenseman", "Studnicka is cen" for "Studnicka is center"). No headline or byline is recoverable from the OCR. The draft's long description lists Paul Lelievre instead of the OCR text, which actually names "Paul Lelievre" — wait, OCR says "Paul Lelievre" but the draft says the B.C. recruits were "Dave Wensley, Stan Czenczek, and Dave Nonis," omitting Lelievre. Minor omission but not a factual error per se. Content is tangential to the Sockeyes: Stan Czenczek (listed on the Sockeyes roster) is mentioned here in a January 1985 college hockey recruitment context, roughly two years before the 1987 Sockeyes season. Archive-worthy as an early career reference for a known Sockeyes player.
